item.title: Sony Xperia 5 V 6.1 Pulgadas 21:9 HDR OLED 120Hz Distancia Focal Triple con Sensor Next Gen& ZEISS Android 13 SIM Libre 8GB RAM 128GB Almacenamiento Dual SIM Híbrida1
item.description: Está Sony Xperia 5 V 6.1 Pulgadas 21:9 HDR OLED 120Hz Distancia Focal Triple con Sensor Next Gen& ZEISS Android 13 SIM Libre 8GB RAM 128GB Almacenamiento Dual SIM Híbrida1 en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: Remarkable performance keeps up with you for longer The powerful 5,000mAh battery will last until the next morning - still with up to 50% left With High-Res Audio, it’s like being in the studio - go wireless or use the 3.
